commit_subject: rfkill: Fix incorrect check to avoid NULL pointer dereference
notes: Single-shot generation targeted the deref-before-null-check pattern (use-before-check / wrong-order check).
Predicate dereferences() covers *p, p->f, &p->f (the exact rfkill_register shape), and p[i]; isNullCheck() covers ==NULL, !=NULL, !p, and bare if(p) guards.
Reachability via CFG successor closure; suppresses cases where the variable is reassigned between deref and check.
Compiled clean on first attempt (0 repair iters); no POC for C0.
